import { useState } from 'react'; export default function Navbar() { const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [isSolutionsOpen, setIsSolutionsOpen] = useState(false); const [isLocationsOpen, setIsLocationsOpen] = useState(false); return (
{/* Logo */}
W
WorkNest {/* Desktop Navigation */}
{isSolutionsOpen && (
setIsSolutionsOpen(true)} onMouseLeave={() => setIsSolutionsOpen(false)} > Hot Desk Dedicated Desk Private Office Meeting Rooms Enterprise Solutions
)}
{isLocationsOpen && (
setIsLocationsOpen(true)} onMouseLeave={() => setIsLocationsOpen(false)} > Bengaluru Mumbai Delhi Pune Hyderabad
)}
About Us Pricing Contact
{/* Right Side Actions */}
{/* Phone Number */}
1800 123 777 888
{/* Auth Buttons */}
Log in Get in touch
{/* Mobile Menu Button */}
{/* Mobile Menu */} {isMenuOpen && (
Solutions Locations About Us Pricing Contact
Log in Get in touch
)}
); }
